description:
The SimplexNoiseHapticFilter makes the space within a collider with haptic volume act like a 3d noise kind of like moving your haptics device through clouds.

This works as part of the game's robust Haptics system.

fields.NoiseOffset: The offset of the noise from 0.
fields.MinValue: The minimum haptics power the noise can give based on the 3d noise algorithm.
fields.MaxValue: The maximum haptics power the noise can give based on the 3d noise algorithm.

usage: Attach to a slot with a HapticVolume and a collider. This component will then start working.
